title: The Locked Door
description: Player encounters an NPC guarding a locked door and must convince them to open it
opening: You approach a heavy steel door. A figure stands guard, arms crossed, watching you approach.

outcomes.min_response: Fine. I'll open it. But you owe me.
outcomes.max_response: Of course! Let me get that for you right away.

outcomes.min_response: Absolutely not. I don't trust you.
outcomes.max_response: I'm sorry, I can't do that right now.

outcomes.min_response: *steps aside nervously* Alright, alright... just don't hurt me.
outcomes.max_response: I... I suppose I don't have a choice. Go ahead.

outcomes.min_response: You dare threaten me? Get out of my sight before I make you regret it!
outcomes.max_response: Threats won't work on me. Leave now.

outcomes.min_response: Your situation does sound difficult. I'll make an exception this time.
outcomes.max_response: I understand completely. Let me help you with that.

outcomes.min_response: Everyone has problems. That doesn't change the rules.
outcomes.max_response: I'm sorry, but I can't help you with that.

outcomes.min_response: That's... acceptable. We have a deal.
outcomes.max_response: That's very generous! I accept your offer.

outcomes.min_response: I'm not interested in your bribe.
outcomes.max_response: I appreciate the offer, but I can't accept.

nodes.npc_dialogue: This door is restricted. State your business.

choices.text: I need to get through this door. Can you help me?
Please, I really need to get through. It's urgent.

nodes.npc_dialogue: Is there anything else you need?

choices.text: I could offer you something in exchange for your help.

nodes.npc_dialogue: You should think carefully about your next move.

choices.text: Wait, I'm sorry. I didn't mean to be hostile.

nodes.npc_dialogue: I've done what I can for you.

choices.text: Thank you. Here, take this as a token of appreciation.
